chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 745 of 2025 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.3966/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.1, 2, 14 & 22. 3. For orders on CMA No.3967/2025. 4. For orders on CMA No.3968/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025 Syed Zeeshan Ali, advocate for the petitioners. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2, 4 & 5. Office has raised serious issue as to maintainability including: “1. How prayers are maintainable without exhausting the remedy. 2. When registration is already suspended (as per Page 17), then how prayer 1 is maintainable.” Counsel remains unable to satisfy on either account. Petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed alongwith pending application/s. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
